basic_details.job_title: MZU Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Pachhunga University College is recruiting for 1 Project Associate-I position on a full-time temporary basis.

age_limit.age_details: Anusandhan National Research Foundation (ANRF), Govt. of India

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: Maximum 30 years (relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST/PH/Female and 3 years for OBC candidates).
qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Plant Pathology (Agri.)/Botany/Life Sciences or related disciplines with minimum 60% marks. Candidate must be fluent in Mizo language.

how_to_apply: Interested candidates may send their self-attested scanned copies of certificates, mark sheets, and duly filled application form (Annexure-I) by email to [email protected] on or before 07.07.2026.
Shortlisted candidates will be called for an Offline Interview on 09.07.2026.

Principal Investigator Dr. Navaneetha Krishnan J Assistant Professor, Department of Biotechnology Pachhunga University College, Aizawl-796001, Mizoram Email: [email protected] Mobile: 9445763012 / 8668165529
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary and time-bound for the duration of the project. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the offline interview. Candidates must bring original documents at the time of interview.

rows.pachhunga_university_college_aizawl_mizo: Exploration, Collection and Characterization of Mizoram Chilli Germplasm Using Morphological, Biochemical and Molecular Approaches, and Screening for Anthracnose Resistance
Anusandhan National Research Foundation (ANRF), Govt. of India

content_sections.heading: Pachhunga University College Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
Pachhunga University College Project Associate Vacancy Details
Pachhunga University College Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: M.Sc. in Plant Pathology (Agri.)/Botany/Life Sciences or related disciplines with minimum 60% marks. Candidate must be fluent in Mizo language.
Research experience in plant pathogenic fungi, molecular techniques, agricultural field experiments. Willingness to travel across Mizoram. NET (CSIR/UGC/ASRB) / GATE qualified.
Maximum 30 years (relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST/PH/Female and 3 years for OBC candidates).

content_sections.text: Interested candidates may send their self-attested scanned copies of certificates, mark sheets, and duly filled application form (Annexure-I) by email to [email protected] on or before 07.07.2026. Shortlisted candidates will be called for an Offline Interview on 09.07.2026. Principal Investigator Dr. Navaneetha Krishnan J Assistant Professor, Department of Biotechnology Pachhunga University College, Aizawl-796001, Mizoram Email: [email protected] Mobile: 9445763012 / 8668165529

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Pachhunga University College Project Associate 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 07th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Project Associate-I at Pachhunga University College?
faq.answer: ₹33,000 + HRA (without NET) and ₹37,000 + HRA (with NET) as per Govt. rules.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for Project Associate-I in Mizoram Chilli Project?
faq.answer: M.Sc. in Plant Pathology, Botany, or Life Sciences with minimum 60% marks and fluency in Mizo language.

faq.question: Q4. When is the interview for Pachhunga University College Project Associate?
faq.answer: The offline interview is scheduled for 09th July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for Pachhunga University College Biotechnology Project Associate?
faq.answer: Send the filled application form (Annexure-I) along with scanned documents to [email protected].

faq.question: Q6. What is the duration of the Project Associate position at Pachhunga University College?
faq.answer: The project duration is Three Years.

faq.question: Q7. Is NET/GATE qualification mandatory for Pachhunga University College Project Associate?
faq.answer: It is desirable. Candidates with NET/GATE will receive higher emoluments.

faq.question: Q8. What is the age limit for Project Associate-I at Pachhunga University College?
faq.answer: Maximum 30 years (with applicable relaxations for reserved categories).

faq.question: Q9. Is prior research experience required for the Mizoram Chilli Germplasm Project?
faq.answer: It is desirable, especially in plant pathology, molecular techniques, and field experiments.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for Pachhunga University College Project Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Refer to the advertisement dated 22.06.2026 issued by the Department of Biotechnology, Pachhunga University College.
